globalStyle: YjsE yjse-pixel-v1 crisp side-view pixel art. Binary alpha, continuous dark outer silhouette, top-left lighting, clustered palette shading, no antialiasing, no gradients, no text.
globalNegativePrompt: blur, partial alpha, soft glow, noise dithering, watermark, logo, copied game art, text, frame labels
globalRequirements: Keep transparent corners and a readable one-pixel dark silhouette.
Keep every frame aligned to its declared source rectangle and origin.

briefs.subject: native four-frame meadow butterfly wildlife polish sheet
briefs.prompt: YjsE yjse-pixel-v1 side-view meadow butterfly at native 16x16: broad asymmetric pink wing planes, warm gold body, readable head and antennae, and four clearly separated raised-to-lowered wing phases without scaling a smaller source.
requirements: Export exactly 64x16 with four native 16x16 frames: flight_0 through flight_3.
Visual center stays registered to origin (8,8), with binary alpha and transparent sheet corners.
Every flight frame must have a distinct wing silhouette while preserving the body and facing direction.
Runtime targets: entities/meadow_butterfly.json and the meadow_butterfly RuntimeEntityAnimationProfile.

briefs.subject: native four-frame forest moth wildlife polish sheet
briefs.prompt: YjsE yjse-pixel-v1 side-view forest moth at native 16x16: angular leaf-green wings, dark fuzzy body, restrained amber head accents, antennae, and four readable flap phases distinct from the meadow butterfly.
requirements: Export exactly 64x16 with four native 16x16 frames: flight_0 through flight_3.
Visual center stays registered to origin (8,8), with binary alpha and transparent sheet corners.
Use angular leaf-like wing edges and a heavier body so the moth is distinguishable at 1x scale.
Runtime targets: entities/forest_moth.json and the forest_moth RuntimeEntityAnimationProfile.

briefs.subject: native four-frame cave glowbug wildlife polish sheet
briefs.prompt: YjsE yjse-pixel-v1 side-view cave glowbug at native 16x16: compact dark crystal thorax, contained cyan abdomen light, hard translucent-looking blue wing planes rendered with opaque palette clusters, head and antennae, and four distinct flight phases.
requirements: Export exactly 64x16 with four native 16x16 frames: flight_0 through flight_3.
Keep the visual center registered to origin (8,8), binary alpha and transparent sheet corners.
Contain all luminance inside the outlined abdomen; no soft glow or partial alpha outside the silhouette.
Runtime targets: entities/cave_glowbug.json and the cave_glowbug RuntimeEntityAnimationProfile.

briefs.subject: four-frame meadow pollen particle sheet
briefs.prompt: Four restrained gold pollen clusters with dark contours and readable drift changes.
requirements: Four 16x16 frames.
Each frame has enough opaque pixels for native-scale readability.

briefs.subject: four-frame forest leaf drift particle sheet
briefs.prompt: Four clustered leaf fragments turning through a short wind loop.
requirements: Four 16x16 frames.
Dark contours separate leaves from light and dark backgrounds.

briefs.subject: four-frame cave dust particle sheet
briefs.prompt: Four compact cave-dust clusters with muted earth bodies and sparse crystal highlights.
requirements: Four 16x16 frames.
Do not resemble ore or an interactable pickup.

briefs.subject: four-frame meadow crown slime elite mob
briefs.prompt: Large readable meadow slime with leaf body, gold eyes, crown-like horns, idle and attack motion.
requirements: Four 32x32 frames: idle, windup, move, attack.
Ground origin remains 16,31.

briefs.subject: native four-frame armored forest boar elite polish sheet
briefs.prompt: YjsE yjse-pixel-v1 elite counterpart to the polished native forest boar: preserve the exact body, eye, tusk, hoof and action registration while adding layered green leaf plates, readable crown spikes, and restrained bright leaf-tip accents.
requirements: Export exactly 128x32 with four 32x32 frames matching forest_boar order: idle, windup, charge, attack.
Ground origin remains (16,31); binary alpha, transparent corners and a continuous dark silhouette are mandatory.
Armor must follow each action pose without covering the eye, tusk, hoof line or charge silhouette.
Runtime targets: forest biome eliteSpriteId and the forest_boar_elite RuntimeEntityAnimationProfile.

briefs.subject: four-frame crystal cave spider elite mob
briefs.prompt: Existing cave spider mob language upgraded with hard crystal carapace spikes.
requirements: Four 32x32 frames matching cave_spider order.
Ground origin remains 16,28.

briefs.subject: meadow biome UI icon
briefs.prompt: Compact framed meadow mark with rolling grass and one wildflower.
requirements: Readable at 16x16 display size.
No text or letter glyphs.

briefs.subject: forest biome UI icon
briefs.prompt: Compact framed forest mark with one layered pine silhouette and trunk.
requirements: Readable at 16x16 display size.
No text or letter glyphs.

briefs.subject: cave biome UI icon
briefs.prompt: Compact framed cave mark with a dark ceiling and two contained crystal shapes.
requirements: Readable at 16x16 display size.
No text or letter glyphs.
